image:image.image:title: THE SIGNAL: daily tech oracle and live betting pit

image:image.image:caption: Panniantong/Agent-Reach is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstream dev workflows within two quarters.
Devs are starring mattpocock/skills hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months.
Watching Running local models is good now climb HN. This is the kind of thing that quietly becomes table-stakes infrastructure within six...
KDE Plasma 6.7 released is the quiet Lobsters pick. This is usually how the next standard library or pattern starts.
The HN front page is piling onto local-first sync engines. Expect the tooling around it to consolidate into one default winner within two...
Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on test-time compute scaling just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this goes from paper to shipped product feature insid...
Devs are starring ggml-org/llama.cpp hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months.
vercel/ai is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstream dev workflows within two quarters.
Dev.to writers are rallying around typed API clients. Expect tutorials to outpace the docs and adoption to snowball within a quarter.
Ars is covering AI data-center power demand. When it crosses from tech press to mainstream, regulation or a major incumbent move follows ...
The HN front page is piling onto on-device inference runtimes. Expect the tooling around it to consolidate into one default winner within...
Lobsters is chewing on deterministic build systems. When the careful crowd gets interested, it tends to be a default tool a year out.
Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on sparse mixture-of-experts routing just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this goes from paper to shipped product featu...
Devs are starring zed-industries/zed hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months.
